verse_text: For the message of the cross is foolishness to those who are perishing, but to us who are being saved it is the power of God.

pericope.title: The Message of Unity: Exaltation of the Cross

links.context: The overly righteous are like the Pharisee who "went up to the temple to pray" (Lk 18:10), and the overly wise may be likened to the wise of this world ([[1CO.1:18]]). St. Paul writes, "Therefore let him who thinks he stands take heed lest he fall" ([[1CO.10:12]]).
